title: Spring Showcase 2025
description: Our flagship annual demo day. Come see what Stanford Student Robotics teams have been building all year — live robot demos, poster presentations, and awards.

title: ROS 2 Intro Workshop
description: Hands-on introduction to ROS 2. We'll cover nodes, topics, services, and build a simple mobile robot simulation in Gazebo. Bring your laptop.

title: ICRA 2025 — Atlanta
description: The club is sending a delegation to the International Conference on Robotics and Automation. Applications to join the group are now open.

title: Hardware Night
description: Monthly open shop night. Bring your own project or just come learn. Club machines and materials available. Seniors and grad students on hand to help.

title: Controls Seminar: MPC in Practice
description: Club alum and PhD candidate Leo Park walks through model predictive control — intuition, implementation tradeoffs, and examples from his legged locomotion research.

title: IEEE Makathon 2025
description: 24-hour hardware competition co-organized with Stanford IEEE. Open to all undergrads. Cash prizes, sponsor demos, and hardware kits provided.

title: End-of-Year Banquet
description: Celebrate the year with the full club. Awards for most impactful project, best newcomer, and leadership recognition. Free food and photos.

title: ML for Robotics — Session 1: Perception
description: First session of a four-part series. Covers visual perception pipelines: YOLO-based detection, depth estimation, and point-cloud processing for real-time robot applications.
